name: Sachal Vasandani
abstract: Sachal Vasandani, sometimes known professionally as Sachal, is an American jazz singer. He released two albums in 2025 on the Patron Saint label: "Best Life Now", and "Best Life Now- Acoustic Sessions".

concerts.label: Perelman American Roots: Big Sound, Big Apple: Jazz in New York City - Sachal Vasandani

about_quotes.speaker: Jon Weber
about_quotes.evidence: Sachal Vasandani was a great guitarist. I had Taylor Eigsti, Julian Lage, Grace Kelly...
about_quotes.doc_title: Jon Weber interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, June 2, 2012
